title: Craftable Enchanted Books for ICV
description: This mod adds crafting recipes for the Enchanted Books created by Igneo's Combat Revamp.
body:
# Craftable Enchanted Books for ICV
This mod adds crafting recipes for enchanted books added by the mod Igneo's Combat Revamp.

In order to craft an enchanted book, you need a book, lapis lazuli, and a third ingredient specific to each enchantment. You can view the recipes using [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) which requires this mod to be installed client-side.

For example, this is the recipe for the Flare enchanted book.

![Flare Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adb0e580cc4f7e398bcc97e997c9f52b93b547b9.png)

If you have anything you want changed about the recipes, just tell me. I plan on changing them soon.

Thanks to Igneo220 for creating [Igneo's Combat Revamp](https://modrinth.com/mod/igneos-combat-revamp)

UPDATED
Here are the third ingredients for each Enchantment as of 0.2:

```
Accelerate: Spyglass
Acrobatic: Rabbit's Foot
Backpedal: Piston
Black Hole: End Crystal
Blitz: Copper Ingot
Blizzard: Packed Ice
Breakthrough: Iron Axe
Brute Touch: Anvil
Comet Strike: Amethyst Shard
Concussion: Grindstone
Crush: Gravel
Double Jump: Feather
Extract: Chain
Flamethrower: Fire Charge
Flare: Blaze Powder
Gust: Iron Ingot
Incapacitate: Soul Sand
Judgement: TNT
Kinetic: Redstone
Mitosis: Slime Ball
Momentum: Powered Rail
Parry: Shield
Phantom Pain: Emerald
Phasing: Spectral Arrow
Recoil: Tripwire Hook
Rend: Redstone Torch
Riptide: Prismarine Shard
Scatter: Dispenser
Silk Touch: Shears
Siphon: Fermented Spider Eye
Skewering: Quartz
Sky Charge: Scaffolding
Smite: Lightning Rod
Stone Caller: Pointed Dripstone
Tempo Theft: Diamond
Train Dash: Furnace Minecart
Warden Scream: Sculk Sensor
Wardenspine: Soul Torch
Whistler: Target Block
```
